.. _api_io:

pycmplot.io
===========

Handles loading and pre-processing of summary statistics files.
Auto-detects delimiters and resolves non-standard column names to the
canonical names used internally by pycmplot.

.. currentmodule:: pycmplot.io

.. automodule:: pycmplot.io
   :members:
   :undoc-members:
   :show-inheritance:
